title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: DeepSeek-R1：通过强化学习激励大模型的推理能力
abstract: General reasoning represents a long-standing and formidable challenge in artificial intelligence. This paper shows that the reasoning abilities of LLMs can be incentivized through pure reinforcement learning, obviating the need for human-labeled reasoning trajectories. The proposed RL framework facilitates the emergent development of advanced reasoning patterns, such as self-reflection, verification, and dynamic strategy adaptation.
